title: National Anthem Act
description: National Anthem Act (National Anthem Act). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the National Anthem Act .

provisions.title: National anthem
provisions.content: 2 The words and music of the song “O Canada”, as set out in the schedule, are designated as the national anthem of Canada.

provisions.title: Public domain
provisions.content: 3 The words and music of the national anthem of Canada are hereby declared to be in the public domain.

provisions.title: National Anthem —
provisions.content: SCHEDULE / ANNEXE (Section 2 / article 2 ) National Anthem — Hymne national O Canada Previous Version
